title: αS PFF Assembly Protocol
steps: Remove monomer stock from -80 °C and thaw On ice .
Dilute stock to desired concentration (typically 5 µg/µL ) to a final volume of 300 µL in autoclaved 2 mL centrifuge tubes.
Set thermocycler for continuous shaking ( 1000 rpm, 37 °C, ).
Run PBS and Protein samples. Take 2 µL aliquot at 0 hr time point. Run ThioT Assay.
Take 2 µL aliquots twice per day for up to 120:00:00 ( 72 hours - 96 hours may be sufficient).
Prepare ThioT stock mixture ( 8 µg ThioT in 10 µL milliQ H 2 O).
Prepare working ThioT mixture, 20 µL stock into 1 mL PBS.
Dispense 200 µL working solution into each 2 µL aliquot.
Dispense 200 µL per sample into 96-well, black, corning glass-bottomed plate.
creator: Jane Balster
